member_group_no.text: ตั้งแต่หน่วย

monthly_date.text: วันที่ข้อมูล

root.sql:
select sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_type_code ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name ,count(sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_account_no) as count_dep_acc_no ,sum(sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_balance) as sum_deposit_balance
from sc_cls_mon_dep_accno ,sc_dep_m_rule ,sc_mem_m_membership_registered where ( sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_type_code = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_type_code ) and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.membership_no and ( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no in ( select membership_no from sc_dep_m_creditor where close_status <> 'C' and deposit_type_code = '20' ) ) and sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_balance > 0 /*WHERE*/ --and sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.monthly_date = '31/07/2020' --and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no between '011001' and '011001'
group by sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_type_code ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name order by sc_cls_mon_dep_accno.deposit_type_code ,sc_dep_m_rule.deposit_name
